历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science (including physics category) were 7904 → 7000 → 5547 → 6118 → 11493. In 2025, due to the new college entrance examination reform, the physics category subject group with no further subject restrictions saw a significant drop to 11493, a shift of about 5375 places compared to the 2024 science ranking of 6118, indicating drastic fluctuation. The university's enrollment plan in Yunnan for science/physics category: 79 in 2021, 79 in 2022, 79 in 2023, 79 in 2024, 85 in 2025, and 88 in 2026. In 2026, there is an increase of 3 students compared to 2025, a growth of about 3.5%, slightly alleviating competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 84th, with recent rankings from 75 → 83 → 84, showing a slight decline but overall stability, belonging to the upper-middle tier of strong science and engineering universities in China. In the 2026 reputation evaluation documents, no public opinion incidents related to North China Electric Power University (Beijing) appeared, indicating a stable reputation during the application period without significant negative or positive public opinion impacts. Its total Douyin popularity ranking did not enter the top 106, with moderate short video exposure and medium application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Electrical Engineering was rated A, and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics were rated A-, both core disciplines in the energy and power field, highly consistent with the university's characteristics, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Electrical Engineering and Automation major was rated as 'highly popular and recommended' in the 2024 major popularity analysis, and its popularity continued to be relatively high in 2025, as the university's flagship major with strong appeal. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination takers in the province in 2026 is about 377,900, an increase of about 32.3% from 285,700 in 2025. By proportion, physics category candidates are estimated at about 229,200, a significant increase from 173,300 in 2025, sharply intensifying competition. The university is located in Beijing, a first-tier city university, with strong regional appeal to candidates from southwestern provinces; university_enrollmen.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the significant drop in rankings in 2025 as a baseline, the slight relief from an enrollment increase of 3 in 2026, the substantial increase in physics category candidates in the province (about +32%) intensifying competition, and the sustained high popularity of the electrical flagship major attracting high-scoring students, it is expected that the lowest ranking in 2026 will continue to slightly decline from the 2025 ranking of 11493. The predicted lowest ranking is approximately 11816, with a range of 11316–12316.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 11816, with a range of 11316–12316. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (11316) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 electrical flagship majors; those with rankings in the middle of the range are advised to target Tier 2 majors such as Automation, Energy and Power, and Computer Science as main directions; candidates with rankings near or beyond the upper limit (12316) are advised to use Tier 3 management and economics majors as safety options, while also monitoring changes in the university's enrollment plan in Yunnan Province.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (including history category) were 1815 → 1832 → 2083 → 2056 → 2496, showing a fluctuating and declining trend. In 2025, the history category ranking of 2496 was about 440 places lower than the 2024 liberal arts ranking of 2056. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Yunnan Province: 7 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 7 in 2023, 7 in 2024, 5 in 2025, and 5 in 2026. After a reduction of 2 places in 2025, the number remained unchanged in 2026, with a relatively small enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 84th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, placing it among the top-tier science and engineering universities nationwide, but liberal arts are not its strength. In the 2026 reputation evaluation documents, no negative public opinion related to North China Electric Power University (Beijing) was found, indicating a stable reputation. Its popularity on Douyin is average, with moderate application attention. Its A-level disciplines (Electrical Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics) are all engineering fields, and the liberal arts majors offered (Law, Network and New Media, Public Administration, Foreign Languages, etc.) lack direct support from A-level disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of the Law major was 'differentiated and wait-and-see', while Network and New Media/Foreign Language majors had average popularity. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in the province is approximately 377,900, with an estimated 148,700 history category examinees, an increase of about 32.3% compared to 112,400 in 2025, intensifying competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has some regional appeal for candidates from southwestern provinces, but the number of liberal arts admissions is extremely small (only 5), making ranking fluctuations highly susceptible to individual high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the declining trend in 2025 rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, intensified competition due to a significant increase (about +32%) in history category examinees in the province, and the fact that liberal arts are not the university's strength, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to decline slightly from the 2025 ranking of 2496. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2526, with a range of 2071–2981.
